name: lumin
description: Shared skill bundle for Codex and Claude Code backed by the agent-skills branch.

interface.shortDescription: Install agent-skills into Codex and Claude Code.
interface.longDescription: Lumin packages the curated agent-skills branch as a Codex plugin and ships Claude Code slash-command shims under /lumin:<skill-name>.
defaultPrompt: Use $lumin:team-mini to boot the lighter Claude plus Codex team.
Use $lumin:team-full to run the full TDD workflow.
